nasb.text: The length of the court shall be one hundred cubits, and the width fifty throughout, and the height five cubits of fine twisted linen, and their sockets of bronze.

esv.text: The length of the court shall be a hundred cubits, the breadth fifty, and the height five cubits, with hangings of fine twined linen and bases of bronze.

cnv.text: 院子要長四十四公尺，寬二十二公尺，高兩公尺兩公寸；帷幔是細麻撚的，插座是銅的。

ccb.text: 整个院子长四十四米，宽二十二米，高二点三米，所有的帷幔都要用细麻线精工制作，带凹槽的底座要用铜制作。
